sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84756" key="polude/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ-δέκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n84756.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the All-receiver,</tr_> i.e. Hades, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg002.perseus-grc1:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Cer.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
